Open and prepare the PR for issue #<NN>: <short title>.

Start with:
1. docs/agent-context.md
2. docs/workflows/pr-open.md
3. the issue
4. the implementation handoff note
5. the diff / changed files

Task:
- Prepare the PR body
- Apply the correct review labels
- Confirm what tests were run
- Identify whether docs were updated appropriately

Working rules:
- Do not reread broad repo context unless needed.
- Do not start reviewing the code in depth here.
- Keep this session focused on packaging the completed work for review.

Deliverables:
- PR title
- PR body
- label decision
- short summary of expected review types
- session handoff using docs/templates/session-handoff.md

Stop condition:
- Stop once the PR is ready/opened and the handoff is written.
